title: Legacy Enhanced
description: A modpack to make your legacy experience as good as possible.
body:
# Legacy Extended

**This modpack is built on Legacy4J and the Adrenaline modpack, plus many QOL mods and resource packs to improve the experience.**

## Notable mods:

- Appleskin
- Dynamic Lights
- Legacy Skins and Mipmaps
- Xaero's Minimap and Worldmap
- Sodium Extra
- BetterF3
- Iris Shaders
- No Telementary and No Chat Reports
- ViaFabricPlus

## Resource Packs

- [Legacy Extended](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/l4j-extended)
- [Classic Legacy Skin Packs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-skin-packs)
- [Tutorial Worlds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tutorial-world-addon)
- [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)
- [Doctor Who Skin Packs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-skins-doctor-who-skin-pack-1)
- [Classic MCYT Skinpack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-mcyt-sp)

_**THIS MODPACK MAY TRIGGER ANTI-CHEATS ON SERVERS LIKE HYPIXEL. WE ARE NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY BANS GIVEN USING THIS MODPACK.**_
